items.title: NASA Langley Research Center PolCube Information Site - NASA
items.content_text: What is PolCube? The proposed PolCube mission is an international collaboration between NASA Langley Research Center and the Korea Astronomy and Space Science Institute (KASI).

items.title: Science and Spacesuit Work Before Crew Changes Commanders - NASA
items.content_text: The International Space Station will change commanders on Saturday before three Expedition 74 crew members return to Earth on Sunday. As the homebound trio prepares for departure, the rest of the orbital crewmates is keeping up microgravity research and checking out spacewalking gear.
